# Generated by tools/m8_knowledge.py --write; M8 disables vanilla advancement gameplay.
# Keys and their dependent trigger references remain valid for loaded vanilla script.
ukrainian_farmlands = {
	content_priority = 200
	age = age_3_discovery
	potential = {
		always = no # M8 disables vanilla advancement
		any_owned_location = {
			OR = {
				area = area:left_bank_ukraine_area
				area = area:right_bank_ukraine_area
			}
		}
	}

	requires = lumber_improvements_discovery

	global_wheat_output_modifier = 0.25
	global_legumes_output_modifier = 0.10
	global_fiber_crops_output_modifier = 0.10
}
